text.title: semantic-field-naming Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for semantic-field-naming as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Drop the suffix; let the field name carry the meaning.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Stick to one language; English has the highest prior.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
